import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

# Tile and color constants
EMPTY = 0
FLOOR = 1
WALL = 2
BALL = 3
SQUARE = 4
PYRAMID = 5
GOAL = 6
KEY = 7
DOOR_LOCKED = 8
DOOR_CLOSED = 9
DOOR_OPEN = 10
HEX = 11
STAR = 12

BLUE = 3

DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)


def get_observation(state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    # Agent position normalized
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32) / (H_f - 1)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32) / (W_f - 1)

    # Agent direction one-hot
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)  # (4,)

    # Pocket info: tile_id and color_id normalized
    pocket_tile = state.agent.pocket[0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    pocket_color = state.agent.pocket[1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    holding_blue_pyramid = jnp.float32(
        (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == BLUE)
    )

    # Find blue pyramid location
    ys, xs = jnp.arange(H), jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    blue_pyramid_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    count = jnp.sum(blue_pyramid_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    mean_y = jnp.sum(yy * blue_pyramid_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
    mean_x = jnp.sum(xx * blue_pyramid_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)

    # Normalized pyramid position
    pyramid_y_norm = mean_y / (H_f - 1)
    pyramid_x_norm = mean_x / (W_f - 1)

    # Whether pyramid exists on grid
    pyramid_exists = jnp.float32(count > 0)

    # Relative position to pyramid (agent -> pyramid)
    rel_y = (mean_y - state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_x = (mean_x - state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)) / (W_f - 1)

    # Manhattan distance to pyramid (normalized)
    dist = (jnp.abs(mean_y - state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)) +
            jnp.abs(mean_x - state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32))) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Front tile info
    dy = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction, 0]
    dx = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction, 1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_id = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    front_tile_color = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    front_is_blue_pyramid = jnp.float32(
        (state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1] == BLUE)
    )

    # Step progress
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 80.0

    # Local 5x5 view around agent (tile_id and color_id)
    view_size = 5
    half = view_size // 2
    agent_row = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32)
    agent_col = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32)

    offsets = jnp.arange(-half, half + 1)
    oy, ox = jnp.meshgrid(offsets, offsets, indexing='ij')  # (5, 5)

    rows = jnp.clip(agent_row + oy, 0, H - 1)
    cols = jnp.clip(agent_col + ox, 0, W - 1)

    local_tiles = state.grid[rows, cols, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0  # (5, 5)
    local_colors = state.grid[rows, cols, 1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0  # (5, 5)

    local_tiles_flat = local_tiles.reshape(-1)   # 25
    local_colors_flat = local_colors.reshape(-1)  # 25

    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        jnp.array([agent_y, agent_x]),           # 2
        dir_oh,                                   # 4
        jnp.array([pocket_tile, pocket_color, holding_blue_pyramid]),  # 3
        jnp.array([pyramid_y_norm, pyramid_x_norm, pyramid_exists]),   # 3
        jnp.array([rel_y, rel_x, dist]),          # 3
        jnp.array([front_tile_id, front_tile_color, front_is_blue_pyramid]),  # 3
        jnp.array([step_norm]),                   # 1
        local_tiles_flat,                         # 25
        local_colors_flat,                        # 25
    ])  # total: 2+4+3+3+3+3+1+25+25 = 69

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    # Task: pick up the blue pyramid
    # Success: agent is now holding the blue pyramid

    # Check if holding blue pyramid in next_state
    holding_now = jnp.float32(
        (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == BLUE)
    )
    was_holding = jnp.float32(
        (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == BLUE)
    )

    # Sparse success reward for picking up blue pyramid
    pickup_reward = jax.lax.select(
        (holding_now > 0.5) & (was_holding < 0.5),
        jnp.float32(1.0),
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # Dense shaping: reward getting closer to the blue pyramid (only when not holding it)
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    ys, xs = jnp.arange(H), jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Blue pyramid location in current state
    blue_pyramid_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    count = jnp.sum(blue_pyramid_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy * blue_pyramid_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
    pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx * blue_pyramid_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)

    # Blue pyramid location in next state
    blue_pyramid_mask_next = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    count_next = jnp.sum(blue_pyramid_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_y_next = jnp.sum(yy * blue_pyramid_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count_next, 1.0)
    pyr_x_next = jnp.sum(xx * blue_pyramid_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count_next, 1.0)

    # Distance in current state
    dist_cur = (jnp.abs(pyr_y - state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)) +
                jnp.abs(pyr_x - state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)))

    # Distance in next state (use next pyramid position if it moved, else same)
    dist_next = (jnp.abs(pyr_y_next - next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)) +
                 jnp.abs(pyr_x_next - next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)))

    # Progress reward: positive if getting closer, only when not holding
    max_dist = H_f + W_f - 2.0
    progress = (dist_cur - dist_next) / max_dist * 0.1

    # Only give progress reward when not already holding the pyramid
    not_holding = jnp.float32(was_holding < 0.5)
    shaping_reward = progress * not_holding

    # Small penalty per step to encourage efficiency
    step_penalty = jnp.float32(-0.001)

    total_reward = pickup_reward + shaping_reward + step_penalty
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
